source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
Amongst the graphs shown below there is the graph of the function $f(x)=(a-x)(b-x)^{2}$ with $a<b$. Which is it?
<image1>
extraction_notes: options only contain labels without descriptive option text

image_dependency: question_text explicitly says 'Amongst the graphs shown below' and asks to identify which graph matches the function
image_manifest contains 1 existing PNG image and registry_passed=true
choices are only labels A-E, so the option content is carried by the image rather than text
multi_step: the function (a-x)(b-x)^2 with a<b implies analyzing graph features such as two distinct zeros with one repeated root
the inequality a<b adds an ordering constraint on the x-intercepts
solving requires matching algebraic structure to one of several visual graph candidates rather than reading off a direct fact
there are 5 answer choices, so the task involves comparison across multiple candidate graphs
verifiability: answer_text is a single option label 'A', which is easy to check against the keyed choice
the correctness can be verified from the image by checking root multiplicities, intercept ordering, and overall graph shape
registry_passed=true and the image asset exists, so the needed evidence for verification is available

decision_reasons: 核心资产完整：题干、答案和题图均存在，且 registry_passed=true、issues 为空
样本语义可恢复性强：题干明确要求在给定图像中的多个图像选项里匹配函数图像
虽然选项为标签且选项内容依赖图像，但图像资产已存在，因此不构成核心语义缺失
答案为明确的单项选择，结合现有图像可验证正确性
